new.description: The ACCSvc service creates a Named Pipe with a weak Security Descriptor that allows any authenticated user to connect and send messages. When a specially crafted message (message type 0x03) is sent to the pipe, the service crashes with exit code 1067 (ERROR_PROCESS_ABORTED).
